economic_notes: GBEs include: 1328914 Cardlock LP (cardlock fuel), Ahahswinis Green Investments Ltd (cannabis production/wholesale), HFN Environmental Waste Disposal Services LP (waste collection), Kleekhoot Gold LP (maple syrup), Tsuma-as Tseafoods LP (fishing operations), Upnit Power LP (micro hydro facility, operating since December 2005, 72.5% owned). First Nation is economically dependent on ISC funding via Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to Social Housing tangible capital assets being amortized at a rate equal to annual principal reduction of related long-term debt (CMHC requirement) rather than over estimated useful lives per PSAS. Prior period adjustment increased accumulated surplus by $61,443 (corrections to accounts payable, Ahahswinis investment, and tangible capital assets). Significant deferred revenue increase to $2,008,120 in 2023 from $57,320 in 2022 primarily due to Province of BC grants (Stop Raw Salmon Exports $800K, Island Rail Corridor $600K) and First Nations Drinking Water Class Action Settlement $500K. ISC funding flows through Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council and cannot be separately identified from the $2,224,153 NTC revenue line. total_government_transfers estimated as NTC + Province of BC + DFO + CMHC + FNHА + FNESC + School District #70. 6 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. No remuneration schedule found in the extracted text.
